news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, a significant decrease from the previous quarter. Additionally, the GDP has grown by 3.5% this year, surpassing expectations. The stock market also saw a record high with the main index reaching 30,000 points. Experts attribute this positive economic performance to increased consumer spending and successful government policies. Moreover, the inflation rate remains stable at 2.5%. Overall, the economic outlook appears promising, boosting investor confidence and driving further growth in the market.
news.headline: Hiive, a pre-IPO marketplace, is raising more funds amidst growing competition.

news.summary: In San Diego today, Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (IIP) (NYSE: IIPR), the sole real estate firm on the NYSE dedicated to the regulated U.S. cannabis sector, declared a dividend for Q2 2025 at $1.90 per common stock share, equating to an annualized $7.60 dividend per common share. Since establishment in 2016, IIP has distributed over $940 million in common stock dividends to its investors.
news.headline: Innovative Industrial Properties (IIP) declares Q2 2025 dividend of $1.90/share, totaling annualized $7.60/share. Paid shareholders $940M in dividends since 2016.

news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, Booz Allen is set to hold a conference call on Friday, July 25, 2025, at 8 a.m. EDT to review the financial results of the First Quarter of FY26. This event will be discussing earnings and is open to the public.
news.headline: Booz Allen to host conference call on July 25, 2025, at 8 a.m. to discuss Q1 FY26 results.

news.summary: Merck (NYSE: MRK) has received approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab), its anti-PD-1 therapy, as a neoadjuvant treatment for adult patients with resectable locally advanced head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) whose tumors express PD-L1 (Combined Positive Score [CPS] ≥1). This approval applies to patients in the United States and Canada.
news.headline: FDA approves KEYTRUDA for PD-L1+ Resectable Locally Advanced Head & Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma as neoadjuvant treatment. $MRK

news.summary: A recent report reveals that over 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. The total number of active cases now stands at more than 15,000, with 250 patients in critical condition. The death toll has surpassed 500, while over 10,000 individuals have recovered from the virus. Authorities urge the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to curb the spread of the disease.

news.summary: Invitation Homes Inc., a leading single-family home leasing and management company in the United States, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share for its common stockholders. This dividend will be paid on or before July 18, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 26, 2025. Invitation Homes, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol INVH, focuses on providing quality housing solutions.
news.headline: Invitation Homes (NYSE: INVH) declares $0.29/share quarterly cash dividend, payable by July 18, 2025 to stockholders of record by June 26, 2025.

news.summary: Recently, promising clinical data revealed sustained complete remission with incomplete hematologic recovery (CRi), profound bone marrow responses, and favorable survival outcomes among patients with FLT3-mutant acute myeloid leukemia (AML). This positive trend was observed even in individuals who had received prior treatment with gilteritinib. The results indicate significant advancements in the treatment of this specific subset of AML patients.
news.headline: Biomea Fusion presents updated data for BMF-500 at EHA 2025, showing sustained CRi and deep bone marrow responses in FLT3-mutant AML patients, even those treated with gilteritinib.

news.summary: In San Diego, agents and teams from Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties are being recognized among the top performers nationwide in the REALTrends Verified The Thousand awards. This annual ranking, sponsored by REALTrends, highlights the best in the industry. The President of Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties, Brent Consedine, praised their exceptional agents for their dedication to clients, providing unparalleled service, professionalism, and round-the-clock support.
news.headline: Agents from Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties recognized among top 1,000 REALTORS® by REALTrends.

news.summary: In Minneapolis, Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG), a prominent supplier of architectural building products and services, along with high-performance coated materials for various uses, has revealed that it will release its fiscal 2026 first quarter results on Friday, June 27, 2025, prior to the market opening. The management will conduct a conference call to review the financial outcomes and offer a business update. The call will be held on the same day.
news.headline: Apogee Enterprises (Nasdaq: APOG) to announce fiscal Q1 2026 results on June 27, 2025, before market opens. Management to host conference call.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, an investment was announced in Rome involving SBI Ven Capital's collaborative fund with Sygnum Bank and Azimut Group. The investment is directed towards advancing the implementation of Colossus Digital's Institutional Hub, a B2B marketplace that facilitates connections between regulated custodians and premier entities.This strategic allocation aims to enhance the efficiency and efficacy of financial transactions within the digital domain.
news.headline: SBI Ven Capital invests €1 million in Colossus Digital's bridge round to accelerate Institutional Hub rollout.

news.summary: As of June 13, 2025, the missile market in the Asia-Pacific region is valued at approximately USD 3.69 billion and is forecasted to grow to around USD 6.26 billion by 2030, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.1%. This data comes from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ focusing on the Asia-Pacific (APAC) missile market.
news.headline: By 2030, the Asia-Pacific missile market is expected to be worth $6.26 billion, growing at a CAGR of 11.1%.

news.summary: The company Xenia Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NYSE: XHR) based in Orlando, Florida, is set to announce its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Friday, August 1, 2025. The results will be disclosed before the market opens on that day. The management team will elaborate on the details during a conference following the release.
news.headline: Xenia Hotels & Resorts (NYSE: XHR) to report Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 1, 2025, before market opens. Management will hold conference call.

news.summary: A company named Hyperscale Data, Inc. disclosed that its subsidiary, Sentinum, Inc., is set to commence mining about 375.24 Bitcoin annually starting in July 2025. This would amount to around $41 million in Bitcoin per year, calculated based on the current Bitcoin value of $108,000. Hyperscale Data is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol GPUS.
news.headline: Subsidiary Sentinum expects to mine 375.24 Bitcoin/year starting July 2025, worth $41 million annually at $108,000/Bitcoin.
